exercises.title: Professional Confidence
exercises.instruction: Shadow with confidence. Match the energy and pacing.
exercises.targetText: I'm confident this approach will work.
tips: Keep the pacing steady and assured

exercises.title: Same Consonant Linking
exercises.instruction: Practice linking words with the same consonant sound.
exercises.targetText: Pick the best time for the meeting.
tips: Say 'the' only once when linking 'time' + 'the': time_the

exercises.title: Contrastive Stress
exercises.instruction: Use stress to contrast ideas or options.
exercises.targetText: We're not starting tomorrow, we're starting today.
tips: Extra stress on contrasting words: NOT, tomorrow, starting, TODAY
Use stronger stress on the second contrasting idea
Make the contrast clear through vocal emphasis

exercises.title: Cause and Effect
exercises.instruction: Structure cause and effect statements clearly.
exercises.targetText: Because of the delay, we need to adjust the timeline. As a result, the deadline will extend by two weeks.
chunks: Because of the delay, we need to adjust the timeline.
As a result, the deadline will extend by two weeks.
tips: Use connectors to mark cause and effect
Each part is a thought group
Stress: delay, adjust, timeline, result, deadline, extend, weeks

exercises.title: Expressing Agreement
exercises.instruction: Shadow agreement phrases. Use a supportive tone.
exercises.targetText: I completely agree with your assessment.
